label: Your Pass In
title: Official EmpireX Wristbands
description: Every verified attendee receives a branded Our Empire wristband upon check-in. Your wristband is your access pass to all our.empire hosted parties & content events, throughout the 5 days. ECX wristbands will be similar in style to past trips.
warning: ⚠️ No wristband = No entry. Imposters will be escorted out by security.
